package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for pagination_binding_duplicated_outside_boundary_helper: Repeated pagination DTO binding and defaulting logic across handler files.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule109NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule109NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule109NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario109Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule109NegativeService, input Rule109NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
